name: The Last Hope
short_description: You’ve made the biggest mistake in history. Now, you're the last hope. Explore the UK, Russia, Germany, Norway, Egypt, USA, Mars, and the Moon. Search for food, face creatures, travel through time, and fight to restore humanity. Survive or perish—your choices shape the future.
detailed_description:
You are a scientist working on a time machine when an experiment goes wrong, creating a wormhole that makes humanity and most wildlife disappear. Now, you’re the last hope. Your mission: find the time machine and restore mankind. To succeed, you must explore Russia, Germany, Norway, Egypt, the U.S., Mars, and the Moon. Use portals to travel through various eras, from the Age of Dinosaurs to modern times. But survival is key—you’ll need to gather resources like fish, fruit, water, beer, and even vodka. Use cars, boats, airplanes, and rockets to travel quickly and explore faster.

Key Features:

  • Travel through different eras of time
  • Gather vital resources like food and drink to survive
  • Explore diverse countries including Germany, Russia, the U.S., Norway, Egypt, and the U.K.
  • Travel through space, exploring the Moon and Mars
  • Pilot vehicles like cars, boats, airplanes, and rockets
  • Face different creatures across time
  • Save humanity and become its president
  • Enjoy an immersive soundtrack, with up to 6 country-specific tracks per location

supported_languages:
English*, Russian, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
